sourceTitle: The RS Guy's Updated 2026 Ironman Progression Guide

rows.title: Skip basic challenges by speaking to Challenge Mistress Fara
rows.notes: This will allow you to receive standard Daily Challenges. Optional: Disable combat challenges

rows.title: The Blood Pact
rows.notes: Keep Caitlyn's staff and Kayle's chargebow

rows.title: Monk's Friend
rows.notes: For 2000 Woodcutting Experience and Ardy tasks.

rows.title: Complete the Archaeology tutorial at the Varrock Dig Site and activate the Font of Life relic.
Necromancy!
rows.notes: Talk to Sostratus after the quest for a set of Necromancer robes. Use Necromancy for most early game quest combat.

rows.title: Violet is Blue
rows.notes: Use Exp lamps on farming to skip early game allotment farming

rows.title: Violet is Blue Too
rows.notes: 1 XP lamp on Mining Mining; 1 XP lamp on Smithing Smithing; 1 XP lamp on Summoning Summoning

rows.title: Druidic Ritual
rows.notes: For easy quest points and early Herblore experience.

rows.title: Wolf Whistle
rows.notes: To Unlock the Summoning skill.

rows.title: Complete the first 3 floors of the Stronghold of Security
rows.notes: For Early game GP. Complete the Stronghold of Safety for an additional 5000 GP and small exp lamps. Use a lamp on Construction

rows.title: Gunnar's Ground
rows.notes: 1 XP lamp on Construction Construction

rows.title: Ernest the Chicken
rows.notes: For easy quest points.

rows.title: Swept Away
rows.notes: Use exp reward on anything you like. Scales at 10x whatever your current skill level.

rows.title: Goblin Diplomacy
rows.notes: For easy quest points.

rows.title: What's Mine is Yours
rows.notes: Gofannon amulet XP reward on Smithing Smithing

rows.title: New Foundations
rows.notes: This quest requires some preparation as you need to purchase supplies from Construction Supplies (Fort Forinthry); 352 limestone bricks. You can also purchase 500 limestone bricks in Keldagrim.

rows.title: Missing, Presumed Death
rows.notes: Required for many later quests. Invitation box is a great teleport.

rows.title: Gertrude's Cat
rows.notes: A Cat is required for later quests.

rows.title: Start growing your cat
rows.notes: Feed your cat using the following food from your bank:; Sardines; Raw Sardines

rows.title: Priest in Peril
rows.notes: Required for Vampyre questline.

rows.title: Sheep Herder
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End quest Series.

rows.title: Hazeel Cult
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Waterfall Quest
rows.notes: Optional: Start the Tree Gnome Village quest to unlock Elkoy's guidance to skip the maze in the future. Very good early Melee Exp.

rows.title: Merlin's Crystal
rows.notes: Good early Quest Points, required for Holy Grail.

rows.title: Holy Grail
rows.notes: Very good early Prayer and Defence experience.

rows.title: Stolen Hearts
rows.notes: Required for unlocking Menaphos

rows.title: Diamond in the Rough
rows.notes: Required for unlocking Menaphos

rows.title: The Jack of Spades
rows.notes: Grants access to Menaphos.

rows.title: Icthlarin's Little Helper
rows.notes: Good early Agility and Thieving experience, and required for Smoking kills

rows.title: Once Upon a Slime
rows.notes: Optional for 2500 Cooking experience.

rows.title: Tribal Totem
rows.notes: Optional for 1775 Thieving experience. Very short quest.

rows.title: Jungle Potion
rows.notes: Required for Shilo Village and Legend's Quest

rows.title: Recruitment Drive
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: The Dig Site
rows.notes: Good early game Mining and Herblore Experience, and required for important quests. Unlocks Shadow Tendrils and Smoke Tendrils

rows.title: Witch's House
rows.notes: Good early game Constitution Experience. Combat section can be slightly difficult at very low levels. Bring food.

rows.title: The Lost Tribe
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests including Extinction

rows.title: The Knight's Sword
rows.notes: Very good early game Smithing experience. Bring food and ensure you have an Iron Pickaxe or above to mine the Blurite Ore

rows.title: The Tourist Trap
rows.notes: 2 XP lamp on Agility Agility

rows.title: Murder Mystery
rows.notes: Required for Recipe for Disaster and King's Ransom

rows.title: Plague City
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End and good early Mining Exp.

rows.title: Biohazard
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End

rows.title: Fight Arena
rows.notes: Required for Ritual of the Mahjarrat and very good early Attack Exp.

rows.title: Tree Gnome Village
rows.notes: Very good early Combat Exp. Required for Monkey Madness

rows.title: The Grand Tree
rows.notes: Use the combat lamp on whatever combat skill you plan to use most.

rows.title: Dragon Slayer
rows.notes: Recommended to use Melee or Necromancy for this fight. 37 Prayer for Protect from Magic is recommended but not required.

rows.title: One Piercing Note
rows.notes: Unlocks the Devotion ability, which is very powerful

rows.title: Observatory Quest
rows.notes: Optional: 5 Varrock museum Kudos and 2,250 Crafting Exp.

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest
rows.notes: Required for Evil Dave's Big Day Out which offers a boost to Spicy Stew

rows.title: Nature Spirit
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Elemental Workshop I
rows.notes: Optional very short quest for 5,000 Crafting and Smithing Exp.

rows.title: Sea Slug
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Fishing Contest
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests. Good early Fishing Exp.

rows.title: Shilo Village
rows.notes: Required for the Legend's Quest.

rows.title: Shades of Mort'ton
rows.notes: World 88 is not always active, so you may possibly need to either use alts to help with the minigame or find others to help you. Make 20 Flamtaer bracelets to speed up building the walls. Make an extra Sacred oil for Legacy of Seergaze. Required for Vampyre questline.

rows.title: Big Chompy Bird Hunting
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End.

rows.title: Zogre Flesh Eaters
rows.notes: Optional for 2,000 Herblore and Fletching Exp.

rows.title: Demon Slayer
rows.notes: Required for the desert questline and Evil Dave's Big Day Out

rows.title: Complete the Varrock Museum Quiz.
rows.notes: Very fast Slayer and Hunter Exp.

rows.title: The Golem
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Shadow of the Storm
rows.notes: Use the combat lamp on whatever you like.

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Evil Dave
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Evil Dave
rows.notes: Required for Evil Dave's Big Day Out

rows.title: Evil Dave's Big Day Out
rows.notes: Very good Herblore and Magic Exp, and unlocks +6 Spicy Stew boost.

rows.title: Beneath Cursed Tides
rows.notes: You can now start completing Giant Oyster monthly

rows.title: You can now start completing Agoroth weekly
In Search of the Myreque
rows.notes: Part of the Vampyre Questline.

rows.title: In Aid of the Myreque
rows.notes: Part of the Vampyre Questline.

rows.title: Buyers and Cellars
rows.notes: Unlocks the Thieve's Guild, for Safecracking later.

rows.title: From Tiny Acorns (miniquest)
rows.notes: Unlocks the Thieve's Guild, for Safecracking later.

rows.title: The Feud
rows.notes: Unlocks the Thieve's Guild, for Safecracking later and Ali's Discount Wares

rows.title: Lost Her Marbles (miniquest)
rows.notes: Unlocks the Thieve's Guild, for Safecracking later.

rows.title: Carnillean Rising
rows.notes: Use the exp lamps for whatever you like. Bank the 10 Mahogany planks for future quests.

rows.title: Dimension of Disaster: Coin of the Realm
rows.questName: Dimension of Disaster: Coin of the Realm
rows.notes: This quest takes less than a minute.

rows.title: Cold War
rows.notes: Mahogany planks can be found in your bank

rows.title: Hunt for Red Raktuber
rows.notes: Penguin questline offers boosts to the Penguin Hide and Seek Weekly.

rows.title: The Fremennik Trials
rows.notes: You can get the raw shark from Temple Trekking or Mogres.

rows.title: Monkey Madness
rows.notes: Very good Combat Exp, and required for Phite Club.

rows.title: Talk to King Narnode and then Daero about being enrolled into the royal guard
rows.notes: Choose experience in Attack & Defence

rows.title: Haunted Mine
rows.notes: Unlocks the Salve Amulet, which is very good for Training.

rows.title: Kili Row
rows.notes: Optional if you wish to play through necromancy or unlock the Gate of Elidinis.

rows.title: Rune Mythos
rows.notes: Optional: if you wish to play through necromancy unlock the Gate of Elidinis Allows crafting of Necromancy runes.

rows.title: Soul Searching
rows.notes: Optional: if you wish to play through necromancy unlock the Gate of Elidinis Unlocks the Sanctum of Rebirth

rows.title: Ghosts Ahoy
rows.notes: Required for Necromancy Questline.

rows.title: Vessel of the Harbinger
rows.notes: Optional: if you wish to play through necromancy or unlock the Gate of Elidinis

rows.title: The Spirit of War
rows.notes: Optional: if you wish to play through necromancy or unlock the Gate of Elidinis

rows.title: Murder on the Border
rows.notes: Required for the Gate of Elidinis

rows.title: Unwelcome Guests
rows.notes: Required for the Gate of Elidinis Also unlocks a new Slayer Master.

rows.title: Dead and Buried
rows.notes: Required for the Gate of Elidinis

rows.title: Ancient Awakening
rows.notes: Required for the Gate of Elidinis and unlocks Vorkath

rows.title: The Darkness of Hallowvale
rows.notes: Part of the Vampyre Questline.

rows.title: Troll Stronghold
rows.notes: 2x 10,000 Exp lamps, and required for Desert Treasure

rows.title: Troll Romance
rows.notes: Optional: grants 8,000 Agility Exp.

rows.title: Shield of Arrav
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Lost City
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests and unlocks.

rows.title: Heroes' Quest
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Throne of Miscellania
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: You can now start completing the Managing Miscellania weekly Distribute your workers like so: # Mahogany (Full bar of workers) # Maple (Your leftover workers)
You can now start completing the Tears of Guthix weekly
Pirate's Treasure
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Rum Deal
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Cabin Fever
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Legacy of Seergaze
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests. Unlocks access to the Blood Altar

rows.title: Underground Pass
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests including Plague's End

rows.title: Death to the Dorgeshuun
rows.notes: 1 XP lamp on Ranged Ranged

rows.title: The Giant Dwarf
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Another Slice of H.A.M.
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.title: Land of the Goblins
rows.notes: How to obtain clean toadflax:; Purchase from Brimhaven Agility Arena Ticket Exchange for 1 ticket; Create Divine herb patch I with 5 Flickering energy and 10 Clean guam

rows.title: The Chosen Commander
rows.notes: Required for Nomad's Elegy, which is required for Sliske's Endgame.

rows.title: Family Crest
rows.notes: Access to Smelting and Cooking Gauntlets.

rows.title: Temple of Ikov
rows.notes: Required for While Guthix Sleeps, and Ancient Curses. Good early Fletching Exp.

rows.title: A Guild of Our Own (miniquest)
rows.notes: Optional: Unlocks Safecracking for Thieving Training to 90/99.

rows.title: Extremely optional* Train your Thieving to level 90 for Player-owned-ports
Optional* Get 6000 Menaphos reputation in the Port district
rows.notes: Make sure to right click port faction (overlay in Menaphos) and set active! The quickest way to gain reputation is to join "Soulobby" friends chat and interact with soul obelisks

rows.title: Do this in the Menaphos Port district. Deposit fish in the deposit box.
Some Like It Cold
rows.notes: Penguin questline is extremely strong and offers boosts to the Penguin Hide and Seek Weekly.

rows.title: Back to the Freezer
rows.notes: Penguin questline is extremely strong and offers boosts to the Penguin Hide and Seek Weekly.

rows.title: Rune Mysteries
rows.notes: Required for a number of important future quests.

rows.title: Rune Memories
rows.notes: Required for a number of important future quests.

rows.title: Enter the Abyss (miniquest)
rows.notes: Required for a number of important future quests.

rows.title: Regicide
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End.

rows.title: Desert Treasure
rows.notes: Unlocks the Ancient Magicks Spellbook. Consider claiming a Guthix staff to use as a weapon for this quest.

rows.title: Lunar Diplomacy
rows.notes: Unlocks the Lunar Spellbook.

rows.title: Optional: Train Divination to level 20. Complete the Memorial to Guthix tutorial, collect 450 Bright energy, collect and charge the Sword of Edicts engram and activate the echo.
rows.notes: Activating the echo will allow you to collect Memory shards while training Hunter. These can be used to create various products, but Sign of the porter IV are recommended (the shards can be banked and used later). 400-800 shards can be obtained per hour, equivalent to 25-50 Sign of the porter IV when weaved (500-1000 porter charges).

rows.title: Roving Elves
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End and Priffddinas.

rows.title: Mourning's End Part I
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End and Priffddinas.

rows.title: Mourning's End Part II
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End and Priffddinas.

rows.title: Impressing the Locals
rows.notes: Required for the Arc, and elite dungeon chest teleport.

rows.title: Bringing Home the Bacon
rows.notes: Required for making Binding Contracts.

rows.title: One Small Favour
rows.notes: 2 XP lamp on Herblore Herblore

rows.title: Legends' Quest
rows.notes: 4 XP lamp on Herblore Herblore

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Goblin Generals
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Goblin Generals
rows.notes: Optional: Small amount of EXP and 1 QP.

rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Lumbridge Sage
rows.notes: Optional: Small amount of EXP and 1 QP.

rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Pirate Pete
rows.notes: Required for the Pirate Questline.

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Skrach Uglogwee
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Skrach Uglogwee
rows.notes: Optional: Small amount of EXP and 1 QP.

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing King Awowogei
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing King Awowogei
rows.notes: Optional: required for the Do No Evil quest.

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Sir Amik Varze
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Sir Amik Varze
rows.notes: Optional: small amount of EXP and 1 QP.

rows.title: Bar Crawl (miniquest)
rows.notes: Optional: required for Horror from the Deep.

rows.title: Horror from the Deep
rows.notes: Optional: unlocks God Books and Optional Quest Blood Runs Deep

rows.title: Recipe for Disaster: Defeating the Culinaromancer
rows.questName: Recipe for Disaster: Defeating the Culinaromancer
rows.notes: 1 XP lamp on Herblore Herblore

rows.title: Eadgar's Ruse
rows.notes: Optional: required for My Arm's Big Adventure.

rows.title: My Arm's Big Adventure
rows.notes: Optional: required for completing King of the Dwarves.

rows.title: Dream Mentor
rows.notes: Unlocks additional spells in the Lunar Spellbook.

rows.title: Smoking Kills
rows.notes: Unlocks important boosts for the Slayer skill.

rows.title: The Eyes of Glouphrie
rows.notes: Optional: required for While Guthix Sleeps.

rows.title: The Path of Glouphrie
rows.notes: Optional: required for While Guthix Sleeps.

rows.title: King's Ransom
rows.notes: Unlocks Chivalry and Piety variants.

rows.title: Knight Waves training ground
rows.notes: Unlocks Chivalry and Piety variants.

rows.title: What Lies Below
rows.notes: Optional: required for Defender of Varrock which leads to While Guthix Sleeps.

rows.title: The Hunt for Surok (miniquest)
rows.notes: Optional: required for While Guthix Sleeps which grants 400,000 Exp.

rows.title: The Hand in the Sand
rows.notes: Optional: required for Hard Ardougne Achievements.

rows.title: Creature of Fenkenstrain
rows.notes: Required for Garden of Tranquility which is a requirement for Ancient Curses.

rows.title: Garden of Tranquillity
rows.notes: Required for Ancient Curses.

rows.title: The Tale of the Muspah
rows.notes: Required for Ancient Curses.

rows.title: Missing My Mummy
rows.notes: Required for Ancient Curses.

rows.title: A Tail of Two Cats
rows.notes: Required for Sliske's Endgame. Rewards Amulet of Catspeak.

rows.title: The Great Brain Robbery
rows.notes: Optional: required for Pieces of Hate, and completion of the Pirate quest line.

rows.title: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains
rows.questName: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains
rows.notes: Unlocks Fairy Rings.

rows.title: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen
rows.questName: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen
rows.notes: Improves Fairy Rings.

rows.title: A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift
rows.questName: A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift
rows.notes: Further improves Fairy Rings.

rows.title: Enakhra's Lament
rows.notes: Optional: Required for Ritual of the Mahjarrat.

rows.title: All Fired Up
rows.notes: Unlocks the Beacon Network minigame, access to the Ring of Fire and Flame Gloves.

rows.title: The World Wakes
rows.notes: If you destroy the reward lamps they can be reclaimed later. Protip: Watch out for fire balls.

rows.title: Making History
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End.

rows.title: Meeting History
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End.

rows.title: Dishonour among Thieves
rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.notes: Required for a number of important quests.

rows.notes: Required to complete the Barbarian Smithing section of the Barbarian Training activity.

rows.title: Dwarf Cannon
rows.notes: Unlocks the Dwarf multicannon.

rows.title: The Death of Chivalry
rows.notes: Required for Sliske's Endgame.

rows.title: Battle of Forinthry
rows.notes: Optional: required for unlocking the Gate of Elidinis

rows.title: Requiem for a Dragon
rows.notes: Optional: required for unlocking the Gate of Elidinis. Unlocks Ungael Ritual Site

rows.title: Tomes of the Warlock
rows.notes: Optional: required for unlocking the Gate of Elidinis and Necromancy Storyline.

rows.title: Ode of the Devourer
rows.notes: Optional: unlocks the Gate of Elidinis.

rows.title: Remains of the Necrolord
rows.notes: Optional: part of the Necromancy questline.

rows.title: Alpha vs Omega
rows.notes: Optional: unlocks the Rasial boss fight.

rows.notes: Unlocks Red Sandstone and Potion Flasks daily.

rows.notes: Required for Sliske's Endgame

rows.notes: Required for River of Blood

rows.notes: 3 XP Tome on Herblore Herblore

rows.notes: Required for Sliske's Endgame

rows.title: While Guthix Sleeps

rows.title: Spirit of Summer
rows.notes: Optional: complete if you wish to do the Hard Wilderness achievements for the Exp lamps.

rows.title: Reclaim the 3 Ancient lamp from Guthix's Cave if you have reached level 75 in Herblore, Summoning, or Agility.
Within the Light
rows.notes: Required for Plague's End

rows.title: Plague's End
rows.notes: Priffddinas unlocked!

rows.title: One of a Kind
rows.notes: Post-Quest: Speak to the Submerged Statue on Entrana for 25,000 bonus XP.; 1 XP Lamp on Herblore Herblore. Required for Sliske's Endgame

rows.title: River of Blood
rows.notes: You can now train on Vyres for Prayer, Firemaking and Combat Exp. Great source of Herbs and Congealed Blood.

rows.notes: Required for EGWD storyline

rows.notes: Required for EGWD storyline

rows.title: Battle of the Monolith
rows.notes: You can skill during this miniquest using the bank inside of the Digsite Exam Centre

rows.notes: Unlocks additional Ancient Magic Spells.

rows.notes: Required for Sins of the Father, which grants access to Effigy Incubator.
